title: sorbus croatica
intro: Sorbus croatica, also known as the Croatian whitebeam, is a species of flowering plant in the family Rosaceae. This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating digestive issues, and is known to have anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Sorbus croatica include its ability to soothe digestive problems, reduce inflammation, and promote wound healing. Sorbus croatica can be used in herbal preparations such as teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be made by steeping the leaves or bark in hot water.
